noAiProviderHint: The advisor needs a local model (Ollama, LM Studio) or a cloud API key (Claude, OpenRouter, OpenAI) to work. Configure one in Settings > AI, or enable Kaisho AI via Settings > Cloud Sync to use it without local hardware.
askOrPick: Ask a question or pick a template:
focusToday: What should I focus on today?
budgetLimit: Which customers are close to budget limit?
monthHours: How many hours did I log this month?
openIssues: Show open issues across all customers
